description: src/lib.rs:230-248 lifts the error-classification logic into named functions. This makes fetch() and put() readable at the map_err call sites, isolates the typespec ErrorKind variant matching to one file location (which is exactly the surface that changes when azure-core/typespec is upgraded), and keeps the future test surface (see crate-secretsx-bdu0.8) at the right level. A future 'simplification' PR may inline these back into the closures; resist it.
title: Good: is_not_found and is_transient as named functions, not inline matches!
